历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 6444 → 17915 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 8981 → 6396 → 8869. In the past three years, the ranking fluctuated within the 6400–9000 range, with a baseline of about 8869 in 2025. The 2022 gap was an anomaly, and from 2023 to 2025, there was a slight backward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 140–141 from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 150 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 149, a decrease of 1 person (-0.67%) compared to 2025, which is minimal and has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 38th, with a stable range of 36–39 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with average reviews and low short video exposure. There are no abnormal historical admission records for Northeastern University, indicating no gap signals. It has 6 A- or higher disciplines: Control Science and Engineering (A+, top in China), Computer Science and Technology (A), Software Engineering (A-), Metallurgical Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), showing strong overall engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely matching Northeastern University's strong engineering fields, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.42%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, in the Northeast region. Shanxi candidates have moderate willingness to study in the Northeast, with no obvious regional preference or aversion. The university has a large enrollment scale in Shanxi (about 149 in Physics Category), making it a key province for out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8869, the 2026 plan reduction of 0.67% (slightly pushing the ranking number higher), the 3.42% decrease in Physics Category candidates (easing competition), and the high popularity of engineering advantage majors (attracting high-quality students), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (smaller number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8784, with a range of 8284–9284.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8284), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
